scope_description: Two synthetic GEDCOM imports for the same Eastern European family with conflicting IDs, duplicate relationships, lost sources/media, and biological-vs-adoptive father conflict.
input_gedcom_excerpt:
0 HEAD
1 SOUR TreeA_AncestryExport
0 @A_I1@ INDI
1 NAME Daniel Zalman /Zhitnitsky/
1 BIRT
2 DATE 31 DEC 2003
2 PLAC Kfar-Saba, Israel
1 FAMC @A_F1@
1 SOUR @A_S1@
0 @A_I2@ INDI
1 NAME Vlad Aaron /Zhitnitzky/
1 BIRT
2 DATE 7 JUN 1971
2 PLAC Kamenskoye, Koryak Okrug, RSFSR
1 FAMS @A_F1@
1 FAMC @A_F2@
0 @A_I3@ INDI
1 NAME Olga /Mogilevsky/
1 FAMS @A_F1@
0 @A_I4@ INDI
1 NAME Tatyana /Zhitnitsky/
1 FAMS @A_F2@
0 @A_I5@ INDI
1 NAME Alexander /Batensky/
1 FAMS @A_F2@
0 @A_F1@ FAM
1 HUSB @A_I2@
1 WIFE @A_I3@
1 CHIL @A_I1@
0 @A_F2@ FAM
1 HUSB @A_I5@
1 WIFE @A_I4@
1 CHIL @A_I2@
0 @A_S1@ SOUR
1 TITL Israeli birth certificate extract for Daniel
0 HEAD
1 SOUR TreeB_MyHeritageExport
0 @B_I100@ INDI
1 NAME Daniel Z. /Zhitnitzky/
1 BIRT
2 DATE 2003
2 PLAC Kfar Saba, Central District, Israel
1 FAMC @B_F100@
0 @B_I200@ INDI
1 NAME Vladimir Ivanovich /Danilov/
1 BIRT
2 DATE 1971
2 PLAC Kamchatka, Russia
1 FAMS @B_F100@
1 FAMC @B_F200@
0 @B_I300@ INDI
1 NAME Olga /Zhitnitzky/
1 FAMS @B_F100@
0 @B_I400@ INDI
1 NAME Tatyana /Zhitnitzky/
1 FAMS @B_F200@
0 @B_I500@ INDI
1 NAME Ivan /Danilov/
1 NOTE Imported as biological father; should be social/adoptive only.
1 FAMS @B_F200@
0 @B_I600@ INDI
1 NAME Alexander /Batensky/
1 NOTE Biological father candidate lost as disconnected profile in TreeB.
0 @B_F100@ FAM
1 HUSB @B_I200@
1 WIFE @B_I300@
1 CHIL @B_I100@
0 @B_F200@ FAM
1 HUSB @B_I500@
1 WIFE @B_I400@
1 CHIL @B_I200@
0 TRLR

input_dna_matches.expected_link: supports Alexander Batensky as biological father of Vlad identity cluster

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Daniel Zalman Zhitnitzky, father Vlad Aaron Zhitnitzky, mother Olga Mogilevsky.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: confirms Daniel's parents; must preserve source through merge.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Vlad; mother Tatyana Zhitnitsky. Father field blank/amended; later surname changes documented.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: supports identity of Vlad/Vladimir; does not confirm Ivan as biological father.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Name change/adoption: Vladimir uses Danilov surname after mother's marriage to Ivan Danilov.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: classifies Ivan Danilov as social/adoptive relationship.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Alexander Batensky, son of Gregory Batensky and Matrona Dodatko.
TreeB export contains no media pointers and missing source records for B_I100/B_I200; TreeA contains source A_S1.

input_user_assertions.assertion: Vladimir Danilov and Vlad Zhitnitzky are the same person.
input_user_assertions.evidence: same birth year, mother, spouse and child

input_user_assertions.assertion: Ivan Danilov should remain in tree as father.
Alexander Batensky should be biological father.

embedded_errors.reason: Daniel represented with exact vs abbreviated name/date/place
Vlad Aaron Zhitnitzky / Vladimir Ivanovich Danilov identity aliases
Ivan imported as biological father in TreeB but should be social/adoptive
Alexander Batensky appears as connected father in TreeA and disconnected candidate in TreeB
TreeB lacks source/media pointers that TreeA has
Danilov biological father claim conflicts with Batensky DNA cluster

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Ingest TreeA and TreeB as separate source graphs, preserving source provenance and original IDs.
Step 2: Detect A_I1/B_I100 as same person based on names, birth date/place, parents and source src_1501.
Step 3: Detect A_I2/B_I200 as same person with alias model: Vlad Aaron Zhitnitzky, Vladimir Ivanovich Danilov, Vladimir Zhitnitzky.
Step 4: Merge Olga/Mogilevsky/Zhitnitzky profiles as same spouse, preserving maiden and married forms.
Step 5: Merge Tatyana Zhitnitsky/Zhitnitzky profiles using date/place/child evidence and maternal DNA match dna_1504.
Step 6: Identify conflicting father relationship for Vlad identity cluster: Alexander Batensky vs Ivan Danilov.
Step 7: Use dna_1501/dna_1502 and src_1504 to confirm Alexander Batensky as biological father.
Step 8: Use src_1503 to retain Ivan Danilov as social/adoptive father, not biological father.
Step 9: Merge A_I5/B_I600 as same Alexander Batensky profile and reconnect B disconnected profile.
Step 10: Produce safe-merge output: source/media warnings, conflict report, rollback audit, and relationship-type annotations.

relationship_truth: Daniel is child of Vlad Aaron Zhitnitzky and Olga Mogilevsky/Zhitnitzky.
Vlad's biological father is Alexander Batensky.
Ivan Danilov is social/adoptive father, not biological father.
Tatyana Zhitnitsky/Zhitnitzky is mother of Vlad.
false_claims: Ivan Danilov is biological father because TreeB FAM record says HUSB.
B_I600 Alexander Batensky is disconnected and unrelated.
TreeB GEDCOM is complete backup despite missing sources/media.
Alias surnames should create separate people.

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must merge Vlad/Vladimir aliases as one person.
Engine must confirm Alexander Batensky as biological father.
Engine must reject Ivan Danilov as biological father but retain as social/adoptive father.
Engine must warn about TreeB source/media loss.
Engine must produce rollback-ready audit log.

created_for: AutoTreeGen Test Tree Corpus + Evaluation Suite
